title: Use <.link patch> instead of push_patch for a filter
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/tasks_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.TasksLive) that has three <.link patch={~p"/tasks?filter=#{filter}"}> links for the filters "all", "open", and "done". Do not use push_patch/2 for these links and do not use <%= live_patch %>. Use :for over a filter list.
tier_rationale: Single replacement of deprecated helper. Canonical <.link patch=> usage.
